languages.text: "Я дам вам возможность совершить подвиг, равный моему!"
"I shall give you the chance to perform deeds as great as mine!"
languages.original_text: "Я дам вам возможность совершить подвиг, равный моему!"

traits.locale_text: "I shall grant you the chance to perform a deed as great as mine!"
"I shall grant you the chance to perform a deed as great as mine!"
"I shall give you the chance to perform deeds as great as mine!"
"I shall give you the chance to perform deeds as great as mine!"
"I shall give you the chance to perform deeds as great as mine!"

languages.text: “我会给你们机会，去成就不亚于我的伟大功业！”
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to perform deeds as great as mine!"

traits.locale_text: “我会给你们机会，去成就不亚于我的伟大功业！”

languages.text: "Size de benimkiler kadar büyük işler başarma şansı vereceğim!"
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to perform deeds as great as mine!"

traits.locale_text: "Size de benimkiler kadar büyük işler başarma şansı vereceğim!"

languages.text: « Je vous offre une chance d'égaler mes exploits ! »
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to perform deeds as great as mine!"

traits.locale_text: « Je vous offre une chance d'égaler mes exploits ! »

languages.text: «¡Les daré la oportunidad de realizar proezas tan grandiosas como las mías!».
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to perform deeds as great as mine!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Les daré la oportunidad de realizar proezas tan grandiosas como las mías!».

languages.text: "Ich werde Euch die Chance geben, ebenso große Taten zu vollbringen wie ich!"
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to perform deeds as great as mine!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde Euch die Chance geben, ebenso große Taten zu vollbringen wie ich!"

languages.text: 「私は貴様らに、我が偉業に匹敵する偉業をなす機会を授けよう！」
languages.original_text: "I shall give you the chance to perform deeds as great as mine!"

traits.locale_text: 「私は貴様らに、我が偉業に匹敵する偉業をなす機会を授けよう！」
